name: Card
description: Raised surface for grouped content. Polymorphic via the `as` prop (div, article, li).

useCases: Grouped content blocks that need a raised surface
Simple teasers where ProjectCard would be too specific

antiPatterns.reason: Nested raised surfaces flatten the elevation logic — raised on raised means nothing.
antiPatterns.alternative: Structure the inner content with spacing tokens instead.

antiPatterns.scenario: Rebuilding project teasers from raw Card
antiPatterns.reason: Duplicates ProjectCard's layout decisions (image, keywords, hover).
antiPatterns.alternative: Use ProjectCard for anything fed by the projects collection.

a11y: Pass as="article"/"li" so the DOM role matches the context
